summary: CPC Module Final Cleanup testing completed. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Production Planning removed from sidebar, CPC has 3 tabs, Plan dialog requires branch selection. Backend correctly rejects schedule creation without branch.

issues: Route shows blank page instead of 404 or redirect - acceptable but could be improved with a catch-all route

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend CPC.js line 191: sends branch as null when empty - backend validation catches this correctly
Consider adding frontend validation for branch required before API call for better UX
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC Module Final Cleanup fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Production Planning removed from sidebar navigation. 2) /production-planning route shows blank page (no route handler). 3) CPC page has 3 tabs: Production Planning, Branch Capacity, Production Schedule. 4) Schedule from forecast REQUIRES branch - API returns 400 error if branch is empty/null. 5) RM Shortage Report endpoint works: GET /api/cpc/rm-shortage-report. 6) Unassigned schedules endpoint works: GET /api/cpc/unassigned-schedules. 7) Schedules created with branch have SCHEDULED status (not DRAFT).

frontend_ui.CPC page loads with 3 tabs: PASS - Production Planning, Branch Capacity, Production Schedule
frontend_ui.Plan dialog shows Branch field as requir: PASS - Branch * with 'Select a branch...' placeholder
frontend_ui.Plan dialog shows available branches for: PASS - '6 branch(es) available for this SKU'
